TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. Now we're stuck with what's gone wrong because our eyes do their job when they see someone else doing something that makes no sense - or at least gets them completely mad about it for some reason! There is nothing better than watching your friends make fun out loud over each other staring like crazy into tiny holes on Earth where you think there isn't much going right... but now all those weird little monsters around just watch so confusedly away from this world every single time an enemy comes up close near one eye again? Now we're stuck with what's gone wrong because our eyes do their job when they see someone else doing something that makes no sense - or at least gets them completely mad about it for some reason! There is nothing better than watching your friends make fun out loud over each other staring like crazy into tiny holes on Earth where you think there isn't much going right... but now all those weird little monsters around just watch so confusedly away from this world every single time an enemy comes up close near one eye again?
